description: A man in a white striped robe and purple lower garment stands in an ornate doorway framed by colorful Islamic ceramic tiles in blues, greens, and yellows. He wears a white turban and holds a long musket. The doorway opens to a sunlit garden or courtyard beyond. A red marble column is visible at the left. The tiles feature intricate geometric and floral patterns. The figure stands in a relaxed but watchful pose, leaning slightly against the doorframe.
